files.description: Repo charter and the single source of truth for this repo's load-bearing invariants. Carries the DR-035 § 8 hard-refusal catalog (predicate-URI-at-evals-only, no cross-predicate aggregate PASS%, no partner bundle without consent, no basicauth on public origin, no GCP object storage, no render-without-reverification, no paging-SLO-beyond-7-day-silence, symmetric A.0 render), the anti-corruption layer (consume @intentsolutions/core, never vendor), the verify-before-render ingest contract (DR-035 B1, 4 checks), the default visibility tiers (C2), and the no-data-shown-loudly binding (C4). Read this before reviewing ANY change under src/, site/, scripts/, or deploy/.

Public-facing repo overview: the 6-repo Intent Eval Platform map, where this dashboard fits (renders eval-set methodology + signed Evidence Bundles + gate results from the 5 platform repos), the v0.1.0 single-file-HTML/zero-build posture, the public-vs-operator-internal (site/ vs site-internal/) split and its load-bearing strict separation, and the anti-goals (hard refusal triggers). Authoritative on the repo map, anti-corruption posture, and anti-goals. STALE-PHASING CAVEAT: its 'What ships in Phase 2' section (results browser, 6-worker ingest supervision tree, retraction protocol, ops-lite alerting) is now OUT OF DATE — those surfaces are BUILT (puxu.6/.7/.9/.10/.11). For current build status defer to CLAUDE.md (the live binding), not this README's phase framing.

Retraction protocol 4h-SLO operator runbook. Governs src/retraction/ — the integrity capability to take down a published attestation HONESTLY via an append-only signed retraction/v1 record + 410 Gone (never 404) + tombstone disclosing reason_class, with NO site rebuild (rsync + caddy reload only). Predicate URI is the kernel RETRACTION_V1_URI at evals.* (never labs.*); reason_class is a closed enum sourced FROM the kernel. The real <4h deep-URL 410 is a human-gated VPS step.

Internal testing dashboard design RFC (Pillar 1 of the internal ops portal). STATUS = ACCEPTED (acting-head 2026-06-07) AND IMPLEMENTED — not a live/open proposal; the render lane it describes is BUILT (src/internal-testing/ + site-internal/internal/testing/ exist). Authoritative on the gated, teaching-oriented internal testing render lane that renders per-repo testing gates with 5-part teaching blocks (authored explainer + verified data + auto verdict + what-we-measured + what-to-fix). Output goes to site-internal/internal/testing/, basicauth-gated at internal.intentsolutions.io per the ratified successor DR-040 override (intent-eval-lab/000-docs/040-AT-DECR-...) — a deliberate per-named-surface exception to the no-basicauth-on-public-origin rule, NOT a contradiction of it. A sibling of the puxu.9 operator-results view, not a replacement.

Ingest pipeline + supervision-tree design doc (DR-035 § 4.B, Armstrong supervision spec). SECURITY-CRITICAL. Authoritative on the verify-before-render fail-closed binding, the 6-worker Erlang/OTP-style supervision tree (one_for_one + rest_for_one + transient/permanent + max_restarts), the 8-step per-worker B1 contract (fetch → verify OIDC → Rekor inclusion → DSSE → kernel schema → content-address → emit snapshot → crash-with-structured-reason on any failure), the two REAL verifiers (sigstore-js prod + offline Node-crypto for tests; neither a no-op), and the pinned-subjects OIDC allowlist. Read before reviewing any src/ingest/ or src/supervision/ change.

Per-repo testing-policy doc (IS Testing SOP). AUTHORITATIVE on the REQUIRED CI gate list defined per DR-035 § 9 (partner-name grep, harness hash verify, C3 aggregate-PASS% lint, predicate-URI-at-labs scan, A.0 HTML arm-symmetry diff — the latter now BUILT as puxu.12) and the hash-pinning workflow. STALE-STATUS CAVEAT: the 'Status — v0.1.0 (Phase 1)' / 'initial scaffolding' / 'no test code shipped' framing and parts of the layer-status table LAG reality — the ingest/supervision/results/freshness/retraction/alerting suites are ONLINE with full coverage. Trust the gate list, not the scaffolding banner; for current build status defer to CLAUDE.md. @intentsolutions/audit-harness is vendored as a dev dep; CI references the in-repo copy, never ~/.claude/ paths.
